title: Piriqueta tovarensis
taxonomy: Piriqueta tovarensis is classified within the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Piriqueta, which is a group of flowering plants that are native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Piriqueta tovarensis is a species of the genus Piriqueta and is found in the tropical regions of Venezuela and possibly other countries. The classification of Piriqueta tovarensis is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Tracheophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Piriqueta tovarensis is a type of climbing vine that is known for its unique characteristics and adaptations.
